programme.desc: 6/7. A performance by Joy Dunlop and band at the Trad Awards, 2023.

programme.title: Trusadh - Sgeulachd a'...
programme.desc: ...Ghille/The Ghillie's Story. 13/14. Tha Seumas MacLetchie a' sgrùdadh mar a tha cultar a' ghille air atharrachadh. Seumas examines how the ghillieing culture has changed.

programme.title: Machair
programme.desc: 1/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.

programme.title: Fraochy Bay
programme.desc: 9/10. Mar is abhaist tha Peadar trang a' toirt beò na tha e a' faicinn le suil a mhac-meanmna. Peter has been busy bringing his imagination to life.

programme.title: Alleluia!
programme.desc: 4/6. Iain MacKinnon reads excerpts from Gliocas bhon Bhìoball by Donald Saunders, and Mairi MacInnes narrates from The Mother's Catechism.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

programme.title: Oscar & Ealasaid
programme.desc: 8/8. Celestine invites Mandarine to accompany her and Ernest to Bolero's island.

programme.title: Beathaichean a' Bocadaich
programme.desc: 4/15. Tha Sophie agus a caraidean a' bocadaich coltach ri damhan-allaidh agus muc-mhara. Sophie and her friends dance like a spider and a whale.

programme.title: Peataichean/Pets
programme.desc: 12/15. Eilidh Cormack meets young pet owners who show, tell and share how they care for, play and interact with their pets at home. Eilidh is joined by Leo and Dara and their cat Bòtannan.

programme.title: Na Clangairean
programme.desc: 3/52. Chan eil an Dràgon-Brot' ann an deagh shunnd an-diugh ach dè nì iad mu dhèidhinn? Dràgon-Brot' is in a bad mood today but what will they do about it?

programme.title: Na Clangairean
programme.desc: 4/52. 'S fìor thoil le Granaidh Clangair a bhith a' fighe 's a bhith feumail. Granaidh Clanger loves to knit and to be useful. Followed by 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam.

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: 78/82. Rosemary Ward reads Thig Cò' Rium Dhan Sgoil, Calum Cangarù, written and illustrated by Emma Chichester Clark and translated into Gaelic by Donald John Macleod.

programme.title: Clann na Cruinne
programme.desc: 1/9. Tha bacadh-cainnt air Kana ris an canar stad-cainnt 's tha i ag innse dhuinn mu dhèidhinn. Kana has a speech impediment which is called a stutter, and she tells us all about it.

programme.title: Flix
programme.desc: 9/13. Tha Flix 'son bhith na shàr chat feireil - dìreach mar athair, Zeno. Flix wants to be the ultimate outdoor cat - just like his father, Zeno.

programme.title: Seonaidh/Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: 9/20. Bitzer, Shaun and Flock are convinced that a monster is at loose on the farm and hide in the barn. But what exactly is it they are afraid of?

programme.title: Naidheachdan Neònach CBBC ALBA
programme.desc: 1/2. Ellen NicDhòmhnaill le taghadh de na naidheachdan as annasaiche a tha ri chluinntinn air BBC ALBA. Ellen introduces her personal highlights from the craziest news show on BBC ALBA!

programme.title: Bogaisean is...
programme.desc: ...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 39/52. Tha 'ad uile glè fharpaiseach an-diugh. They are all very competitive today.

programme.title: Slighe Chladach Fiobha (Fife Coastal Path)
programme.desc: 2/5. Iagan MacNeil sees the magnificent Forth Bridges up close, and visits the Carlingnose Nature Reserve.

programme.title: SpeakGaelic
programme.desc: 21/26. Artist and teacher Críostóir de Piondargás chats to Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean is inspired at an artistic garden on the edge of the Pentland Hills.

programme.title: Hebridean Baker - Nordic Islands

programme.title: Belladrum 2025 - Rianne Downey

programme.title: OMC!
programme.desc: 3/4. Including an unspoken affair of the heart between two rural posties, and the selection process behind Scotland's Croft of The Year. Contains adult humour.

programme.desc: 3/3. Mar a chur Hitler na h-àrd chomandairean gu cogadh marbhteach. How Hitler committed his top commanders to a war of extermination. Contains graphic violence and disturbing scenes.

programme.title: Brunch le Abigail
programme.desc: 8/12. 'S e Lite am bracaist as fheàrr le Abigail airson a thoirt air falbh. Ach chan eil càil sìmplidh mun dòigh a th' aicese air a dhèanamh. Abigail's takeaway breakfast is porridge.

programme.title: Transatlantic Sessions: Dluth an Daimh

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: 10/104. Chan eil Bing air a dhòigh nach e a tha buannachadh an geama a thagh e fhèin a chluich. Bing is unhappy at not winning the game he himself chose to play.

programme.desc: 8/13. Tha Alpheus Benthos ri miastadh - tha e a' feuchainn ris an Ephemychron a ghoid. Alpheus Benthos is up to no good, he is trying to steal the Ephemychron.

programme.title: An Sgoil
programme.desc: 3/6. It's a new day, and news is spreading about Mr Mackle. In the art and drama classroom, it looks as though the collaboration isn't working for Ms NicArtair.

programme.desc: Tweedy is tidying his den and decides that his ribbon collection would be best kept in a box. When Fluff is left alone with the box, his playful antics leave it - well, very unbox-like!

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: When Nok-Nok finds a fallen star, Squiggle visits Magnus at the top of the tree to see if he can help put the star back in the sky. (Ep27)

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!...
programme.desc: ...Big Adventures! When Thomas makes a mistake with a silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hannah shows off a homemade kite, her stunts cause a barbequing accident, sparking multiple fires!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dentist: When Peppa and George go to the dentist, Dr Elephant says their teeth are nice and white - but George's toy dinosaur is in need of a tooth-clean.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Mr Gruber does a good turn for Paddington and says he can thank him by passing it on to someone else, which is harder than it sounds.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy get hand-me-down toys from Frankie and name them Biggle and Boggle. While playing pirates, they worry they've abandoned Piggy and Froggy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Big Hairy's little brother falls into a hole and Tracker gets carried away by Big Hairy.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet construction solution. (Ep33)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pig's Garden. Granny's friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn it's not morning or winter where she is! Daddy Pig explains this using a big ball to represent the earth.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai compete in a Star Hunt through Rumbleton.

programme.title: New: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan is intrigued when he spots strange lights in the night sky. Grumblestunk thinks it's an alien invasion, but Stan and Gran are not so sure...

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The Museum has a brand-new exhibit: the Emerald Bone-Stone! But when the precious bone goes missing, the PAW Patrol must team up with the ultimate master thief herself, Sweetie!

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: When our intrepid trio set off in search of the lost city of Catlantis and its famous fountains, all they discover are little stones.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After Queen Thistle reads the children a story about the stars, the children wonder where they go in the daytime, so they pay a visit to the Wise Old Elf.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Holiday House: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy. Everyone is talking in a different language and Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: The campers bring pictures of themselves as eggs into camp. But Doodle is missing and Odo worries it's because Doodle is adopted.

programme.title: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Everyone loves a good dance party, including Jen! But when the music stops, the Milkshakers will have to be fast enough to freeze, or they could be out! (Ep10)

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Join David in the Story Den for a story about Billie the Bee, who is determined to show off her skills in the festival of talents!

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder
programme.desc: A lavish party on a sun-soaked Gozo beach turns deadly when its host is found murdered. With Jamil the prime suspect, Jack and Kate set aside their personal tension to clear his name.

programme.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Chip shop owner John races to sell his remaining stock before closing for the season, while Val tries to reclaim her sales crown by going viral with makeup tutorials.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: New: Love Nature
programme.desc: Fidra is a small island in the Firth of Forth near North Berwick, and is a significant nesting site for Atlantic puffins, hosting around a thousand breeding pairs, with conservation.

programme.title: The Motorway
programme.desc: A woman attempts to wave down traffic on the M6, a young driver gets trapped in his car after crashing into the central reservation, and a lorry cab threatens to catch fire on the M5.

programme.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
programme.desc: Host Jeremy Vine and team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman are joined by Olympian Greg Rutherford and actress Fay Ripley - but who will win the battle of the brainteasers?

programme.title: New: Alexander Armstrong in India
programme.desc: In a fascinating series Alexander travels to the world's most populous country to find a land of contrasts where the traditional and modern sit side by side. This time Mumbai and Delhi. (Ep1/3)

programme.title: New: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to The Navigator in Sussex, a once-proud seafront hotel now fighting for survival, with the owner drowning in debt, battling constant leaks and crumbling rooms.

programme.title: The X-Files: Our Best Episodes Ever
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully recount their respective versions of events leading up to the death of a teenager suspected of being a vampire.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: (2019) Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as Dick James.

programme.title: Enduring Love
programme.desc: (2004) In Roger Michell's drama, when Daniel Craig and Rhys Ifans witness a fatal ballooning accident, it arouses a violent obsession in one for the other. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Frogmen
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Destination Gobi
programme.desc: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Mean Streets
programme.desc: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven
programme.desc: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma

programme.title: Tomahawk
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: The Menu

programme.desc: Another visit to the maternity ward at Liverpool Women's Hospital. Childhood friends Karra and Danny await the arrival of their third child.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Maternity series which pulls on the heartstrings. Meet two dads-to-be who want to overcome their difficult upbringings by creating blissful childhoods for their sons.

programme.desc: Amiable everyman Louis Theroux explores the casino culture of Las Vegas. Meeting many of the local characters, Louis casts a wry eye over the gambling-obsessed city.

programme.desc: Louis gains access to Coalinga State Hospital in California, which houses more than 500 convicted paedophiles - most of whom have been deemed unsafe for release.
